scripts.dev: pnpm --parallel --filter saferide-auth-service --filter saferide-tenant-service --filter saferide-route-service --filter saferide-trip-service run dev
scripts.build: pnpm run --recursive --filter './packages/*' build && pnpm run --recursive --filter !web-admin --filter !mobile build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @saferide/types --filter @saferide/logger --filter @saferide/middleware --filter saferide-auth-service --filter saferide-tenant-service --filter saferide-route-service --filter saferide-trip-service run test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @saferide/types --filter @saferide/logger --filter @saferide/middleware --filter saferide-auth-service --filter saferide-tenant-service --filter saferide-route-service --filter saferide-trip-service run test:coverage
